entities.name: RICE

entities.description: The geographical region where the rice cultivation and study are located

entities.description: The interaction of water and soil factors affecting crop growth

entities.description: The set of agricultural practices applied to crops to optimize growth and yield

entities.description: The diverse categories of wetland ecosystems found in East Africa

entities.description: The measure of rice productivity, which remains low in the studied region

entities.description: The research methodology combining field trials and simulation models

entities.description: Multi-year trials used to evaluate the response of rice to different management practices
